details: The agent ran kubectl commands against the cluster and correctly traced the full chain: pod db-5bfcfcd584-jcf6z is Pending -> PVC data-cache is Pending/unbound -> StorageClass 'fast-ssd' does not exist in the cluster (only 'standard' is present). The root cause was identified with evidence from the PVC events showing 'storageclass.storage.k8s.io "fast-ssd" not found'.
